summary: The diff implements a comprehensive AI-powered social media content automation system. All six requirements are largely addressed. REQ-1 through REQ-5 are well-covered with backend Motoko actor, frontend pages, and themed components. REQ-6 is partially addressed — the hero banner and brand logo are rendered as static assets, but platform icons use inline SVG from react-icons rather than the specified image files from frontend/public/assets/generated.

missing_requirements.requirement: Platform icons for Instagram, Facebook, Twitter/X, and TikTok should be rendered as static assets from frontend/public/assets/generated (icon-instagram.dim_48x48.png, icon-facebook.dim_48x48.png, icon-twitter.dim_48x48.png, icon-tiktok.dim_48x48.png)
missing_requirements.reason: The PlatformIcon component uses react-icons (SiInstagram, SiFacebook, SiX, SiTiktok) rather than the generated image files from frontend/public/assets/generated as specified in the build request.

hallucinated_features.description: ProfileSetupModal prompting for a user display name on first login as a separate user profile layer distinct from the brand profile
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request only specifies a brand profile setup page (REQ-1). A separate user profile modal for entering a personal display name was not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: Delete scheduled post functionality with confirmation dialog
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-3 specifies creating, scheduling, and status cycling for posts. Deletion of scheduled posts was not mentioned in any requirement or acceptance criterion.
